# Third-Party Dependencies

This directory contains external projects incorporated into 32Hybrid as Git submodules.

---

## tdesktop

- **Name:** tdesktop
- **Source:** https://github.com/telegramdesktop/tdesktop
- **Purpose:** Telegram Desktop client incorporated as a project reference; provides messaging/communication capabilities for integration into the 32Hybrid ecosystem
- **Date:** 2026-03-11
- **Import method:** git submodule
- **Path:** `third_party/tdesktop/`
